name: neondeck
title: Neondeck
description: Quickly add Neondeck PR and ref watches from Raycast.
author: pandemicsyn

commands.name: add-pr-watch
commands.title: Add PR Watch
commands.description: Create a persistent Neondeck PR watch.

commands.name: watch-current-browser-pr
commands.title: Watch Current Browser PR
commands.description: Create a PR watch from selected text or the clipboard.

commands.name: add-ref-watch
commands.title: Add Ref Watch
commands.description: Create a persistent Neondeck branch or commit ref watch.
